title: Candid - A True Adventure
description: Welcome to Candid! This project adds structures, enchantments, and all things catering to a true adventure. It's built as a companion to True Survival Mode, but can be played independently.
body:
![Candid - A True Adventure](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b9d1ac31f86e8df4c005c5435fbf349d72141fc.png)

A Candid adventure.

---- 📝 SUMMARY 📝 > Unique enchantments, subtle structures, and an optional companion mod to [True Survival](https://modrinth.com/datapack/true-survival). Candid adds anything and everything contributing to a True adventure. And while it is designed around True Survival, you don't need it to enjoy Candid.
📚 INFO 📚
🧩Compatibility🧩

Candid is compatible with the latest version including 1.21 and 1.21.1. There are options to install as a mod or datapack.

---- ⚔️ FEATURES ⚔️ > Candid is a lightweight adventure pack that currently adds a new structure with 7 variants and 3 unique enchantments.
🧙Enchantments🧙

Candid comes with 3 brand new enchantments: Archive, Mitosis, and Radiance. All of which can be found in random loot, but have also been added to specific loot tables in True Survival. Archive and Radiance can be found in the enchantment table or villager trades. Mitosis is unique only to loot or trading. -**Archive**= Archive is a sword enchantment going up to level III. Archive increases the amount of XP dropped by hostile mobs. Archive is exclusive with the Looting enchantment. -**Mitosis**= Mitosis is a flint and steel enchantment going up to level II. Mitosis duplicates lit TNT that you ignite with the enchanted item. -**Radiance**= Radiance is a sword enchantment going up to level I. Radiance gives glowing and slowness to enemies it hits, but also grants it to the user. Radiance is exclusive with the Fire Aspect enchantment.

🏰Structures🏰

Candid currently has a single structure with 7 variants: The Campsite. The campsite provides an exploration checkpoint with ready-to-light campfire beacons and sometimes a secret or two to explore. They can sometimes contain Candid enchantments or even True Survival items (if True Survival is installed).

Let me be candid.
